title: Lilith apparently has corona
wikitext:
[]: Lilith apparently has corona             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Sep 26, 2010 12:56 pm Okay so there I was, watching a few clips from 1.11, yes the ones FUNimation uploaded on YouTube, when I noticed this: I'm pretty sure this wasn't in 1.01, but apparently Lilith does have functioning corona behind the "mask" eye holes. Notice how the corona are surrounded by a hexagon structure. I guess it's safe to say that her mask isn't of SEELE's doing and it's biological? Thoughts and stuff? NOTE: By November I'm deleting this pic, so if anyone wants to keep it around copy it to your own photobucket profile.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:01 pm Those are nails with the Seele logo, as confirmed by the first Complete Records book. It's more apparent on the Blu-ray.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:26 pm Oh. Wait, if that's true, why would SEELE want to nail Lilith's eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by Zekkykins » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:45 pm Because it's SEELE and they're derpderps like that.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Sep 26, 2010 2:58 pm It might be part of the mask, and so it would entirely cover Lilith's face just like in the original.

[]: SEELE just likes sticking things in other things.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Sep 26, 2010 2:59 pm You can also see them at the end of 2.22, when the scene cuts to Lilith underground as Unit-01 initiates 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 26, 2010 8:51 pm NAveryW wrote: Those are nails with the Seele logo, as confirmed by the first Complete Records book. It's more apparent on the Blu-ray.

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Tue Sep 28, 2010 8:15 am NAveryW wrote: Those are nails with the Seele logo, as confirmed by the first Complete Records book. It's more apparent on the Blu-ray.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 28, 2010 1:20 pm The relevant post, including scans, zooms, and screenshots, is here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=204167#204167

[]:             Quote Post by jojojoker » Wed Oct 13, 2010 8:34 am When I saw the title, I thought you were talking about the beer...
